error_string: Proxy-Authorization header is stripped from requests

required_files.rationale: Contains rewind_body and header-stripping logic for proxy connections
PreparedRequest.prepare method and header handling during request preparation

sufficient_files.rationale: HTTPAdapter.send() where proxy connection is established
Session.request() flow that passes headers through preparation

error_chain: User sets Proxy-Authorization in headers dict
During redirect or proxy negotiation, headers are rebuilt
Proxy-Authorization is stripped from non-proxy destinations in utils.py
trigger_conditions: Request goes through HTTPS proxy (CONNECT tunnel)
Header stripping logic in utils treats it as sensitive header to remove on redirect
